author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Two features: 1) Pre-OOM hooks that fire BEFORE allocation fails — user registers callbacks like 'split batch in half' or 'free cache' with known memory costs, system calls them in order when projected allocation would exceed budget. Key: hooks declare upfront how much memory they'll free, so the system can plan. 2) ONNX export — trace model forward pass, emit ONNX protobuf graph. ONNX is a standard model interchange format so models can run in onnxruntime, TensorRT, CoreML etc.
